subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter which thou didst write to Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Taqí was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
